bead.title: FEAT-008 P10: US-096 efficacy table + filters + compare
bead.description: efficacy/+page.svelte role=table with columns: harness, provider, model, attempts, success rate, tokens, duration, cost (em-dash if null). URL-encoded filters tier/label/spec-id via native <select>/text inputs. Warning badge <svg role=img aria-label='below adaptive floor'> when success rate below floor; tooltip with routing metrics link. Row click → <aside role=complementary> with last 10 attempts + evidence bundle links; click-through to originating bead. Compare dialog STARTS WITH ZERO ARMS — two Add arm clicks produce exactly two data-testid=comparison-arm elements. Each arm has native <select name=model> + <textarea name=prompt>. Submit → comparisonDispatch; result link appears in Comparisons region.
bead.acceptance: e2e/efficacy.spec.ts 5/5 green; compare dialog starts empty; screenshots committed.
